title: Luffy Challenges Kaido Again
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Nami, Unknown person #7, Tama, Unknown person #8 as The raid becomes a series of decisive matchups while Luffy challenges Kaido and the Straw Hats protect their allies.
scene: The Onigashima raid breaks into decisive one-on-one and group battles as Luffy, Yamato, Momonosuke, and the Straw Hats push against Kaido’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...that was nuts, but at least we're safe now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hey, Nami! Let's get out of here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sorry, Tama! We can't do anything about that now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We'll come back for him later!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The first time I was in the morning, and I was

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Who was that other thundercloud, anyway?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We make one hell of a team, don't we~?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no way that airhead, zes, could've pulled that off!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: you and I have better chemistry! Right, here?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Don't get the wrong idea, you silly boys") I was just obeying Mama.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mama created you 'cause I told her I wanted a girlfriend, you know?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is such a breath of fresh air-)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right~! Im sure the three of us will get along!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Well, well, well! If it isn't zeus!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hi guess we have a new addition!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now that there are four of us, we'll be unstoppable!! Hehehe~)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Your services are no longer required!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mama almost died earlier and you did nothing, Zeus!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hera, go ahead and Gobble zaus up!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You'll grow much stronger once you've consumed his soul!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well then, zeus-senpal, it's time to dig in! <3

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: AHAH!! stop it!! Mama, please stop her!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'm sorry for all my (lumsy mistakes!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: IF YOU DON'T WANT ME, I CAN JUST LEAVE!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll never show myself around you again!! Just please, don't kill me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You expect me to let you run off with a portion of my soul?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you're really sorry, embrace your new role as Hera's Nourish- went!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: i need to get you out of danger, Otama~)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These two are members of the nasty straw hat pirates!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 62 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
